## Relationships (Application-Layer FKs)

**ROUTER_CHANGES** -> ROUTER_CHANGES (CHANGE_DATE->CHANGE_TIME, CHANGE_TIME->CHANGE_DATE); ROUTER_HEADER (ROUTER -> ROUTER)

**ROUTER_DESC** -> ROUTER_SUPP_HDR (ROUTER -> RTR_NUM)

**ROUTER_HEADER** -> CUSTOMER_MASTER (CUSTOMER -> CUSTOMER); PL_MASTER (PROD_LINE -> PROD_LINE); UM_CODES (UM_INVENTORY -> CODE)

**ROUTER_LINE** -> ENG_GROUP (SIGNOFF_GRPUSR -> ENG_GROUP); LOCATION_ADDRESS (PART_LOCN -> LOCN); PROJECT_GROUP (PROJ_GROUP -> F_GROUP); ROUTER_HEADER (ROUTER -> ROUTER); UM_CODES (UM_INVENTORY -> CODE); USER_INFORMATION (SIGNOFF_GRPUSR -> GS_USER)

**ROUTER_OP_CODES** -> OP_CODES (OP_CODE -> OPERATION); ROUTER_HEADER (ROUTER -> ROUTER); ROUTER_LINE (LINE -> LINE_ROUTER)

**ROUTER_SUPP_HDR** -> ROUTER_HEADER (RTR_NUM -> ROUTER)

**ROUTER_SUPP_LINE** -> ROUTER_LINE (LINE->LINE_ROUTER, RTR_NUM->ROUTER)

**ROUTER_XREF** -> ROUTER_SUPP_HDR (ROUTER -> RTR_NUM)
